description: Fix Ngepet intruder phase issues: center 'kamu sudah bersembunyi!' text, and keep item selection dialog open after wrong guess until all guesses used up or win/lose
steps: 1. Center 'Kamu sudah bersembunyi!' text: In IntruderMatchView (NgepetGameScreen.kt), the Card that contains 'Kamu sudah bersembunyi!' text already has `horizontalAlignment = Alignment.CenterHorizontally` on its Column. The issue is that the Card itself is not centered within the parent Column. Add `modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth()` to the Card so it spans full width, and the inner Column's CenterHorizontally alignment will center the text. Also add `textAlign = TextAlign.Center` to the 'Kamu sudah bersembunyi!' Text composable and ensure it has `modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth()`.

2. Keep item selection dialog open after wrong guess (intruder flow): Currently in NgepetGameScreen.kt, the GuessResultDialog is shown globally when `uiState.guessResult != null` (line 103). When intruder guesses wrong (isCorrect=false, isEnd=false), the dialog shows 'Tebakan Salah!' with an OK button. Clicking OK calls `viewModel.clearGuessResult()`. The issue is that after clearing, the `showGuessItemDialog` is already false (set to false in `intruderGuessHidden`). The fix: In the intruder path specifically, when the guess is wrong but NOT ended, do NOT show the GuessResultDialog. Instead, keep the item selection dialog open. Modify the condition: In the main NgepetGameScreen composable, change the GuessResultDialog display logic: only show it if (a) guessResult is for the host (currentRole == 'host'), OR (b) the game has ended (isEnd == true), OR (c) the guess was correct. For intruder wrong guesses that are not game-ending, instead of showing GuessResultDialog, keep showGuessItemDialog = true and show a brief Snackbar-like notification. Specifically in NgepetViewModel's `intruderGuessHidden` success handler: when isCorrect == false AND isEnd == false, do NOT set guessResult (set it to null), instead set a message 'Tebakan salah! Coba lagi' and keep showGuessItemDialog = true.

3. Alternative simpler approach for step 2: In NgepetViewModel.kt's `intruderGuessHidden` onSuccess block, change the logic: if `response.isCorrect == false && response.isEnd == false` (wrong but game continues), set `showGuessItemDialog = true` (keep it open), do NOT set `guessResult = response` (leave it null so GuessResultDialog won't appear). Instead show it as a notification message. Add `message = "Tebakan salah! Coba lagi"` to the state update. The dialog stays open so user can immediately try another item. Only set `guessResult` when `isEnd == true` OR `isCorrect == true` to show the final result dialog.
acceptance_criteria: 'Kamu sudah bersembunyi!' text and its Card container are visually centered below the candle animation
When intruder guesses wrong (not game over), the item selection dialog stays open - no OK button appears that would close it
Item selection dialog only closes when: all guesses are used (isEnd=true), intruder wins (isCorrect=true), or user manually cancels
A notification/message appears briefly when guess is wrong to inform the user, but dialog stays open
verification: Check IntruderMatchView Card has fillMaxWidth and Text has textAlign = TextAlign.Center
Check NgepetViewModel.intruderGuessHidden does NOT set guessResult when isCorrect==false && isEnd==false, and instead sets showGuessItemDialog=true with a message
Check that GuessResultDialog still shows for end-game results and correct guesses
findings: Both fixes applied cleanly. TextAlign import already existed in NgepetGameScreen.kt. bumpCounter() helper already existed in ViewModel. No build verification possible (no Android SDK), but code follows existing patterns and uses correct Compose APIs.
